floundeR Revival TODO

Source: TODO.md

Work from top to bottom unless a later slice is explicitly pulled forward. Each slice should be small enough to commit independently. Substantive work should include a semantic version bump and NEWS.md entry.

Slice 1: Package Baseline

Baseline check result on 2026-06-13: R CMD check now passes DESCRIPTION and namespace validation, then stops because the local R library lacks required imports/suggested packages. The FAST5 retirement slice removed rhdf5; the remaining missing packages are CRAN and Bioconductor dependencies needed by the current non-FAST5 package surface.

Slice 2: FAST5 Retirement

Slice 7: POD5 Discovery Binding

Slice 7A: ONT Open-Data Helpers

Slice 8: POD5 Verification And File Info

Slice 9: POD5 Folder Info And Manifests

Slice 10: Subdivision And Playback Planning

Slice 12: Synoptikon Export

Slice 12A: Porkchop Library-Preparation QC

Slice 13: Grammateus Reporting Integration

Slice 13A: GitHub And Future BioConductor Distribution

Slice 14: Documentation Refresh

Slice 15: Release Preparation
